creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

just grepping this old PR. My japanese is very very bad, but i'm quire sure that "リポジトリ †" means its a repository no longer supported. Since you fetch your files from there, are you sure, its still usable?

Given the age of the PR: please update the port to the newest changes. "portlint" is your friendly helper for this. 

If there is no longer a need for it please close the PR. If there is i will take care of it.

Greetings,
Torsten
